full_text:
Wang Lian (Wenyi) 王連 (文儀)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Lian (王連), styledWenyi (文儀), was born in Nanyang. Shu governor who did well economically. He warned Zhuge Liang of the risk of malaria. Wang Lian was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom. Wang Lian lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
